'''Cho Badeleg''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] at [[ExGal-4]] on [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. He, [[Danni Quee]], and [[Bensin Tomri]] went to [[Helska IV]] to investigate what they believed was an extragalactic [[Comet/Legends|comet]] crashing on the barren [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] surface, and were kidnapped by the true occupants of the planet, the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], led by [[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] [[Da'Gara]]. Badeleg [[Death/Legends|died]] in the crash.<ref name="VP" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1st}}
